WITH min_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        ym.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
segment_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strft...

WITH annual_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS AnnualConsumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(AnnualConsumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM annual_consumption
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
)
